---
title: "Report Title"
subtitle: "Short descriptive subtitle"
author: "Author Name"
date: today
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    pdf-engine: xelatex
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Abstract

Write a short summary of the report.

## Background

Explain the problem and cite Quarto if needed [@quarto].

## Analysis

```{r}
#| label: fig-template
#| fig-cap: "Template example figure."
#| echo: false

plot(cars, pch = 19, col = "#1f77b4")
```

## Conclusion

State the main result.

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
